title: Alter table to add Fkey....
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t5 (ref_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
INSERT INTO t4 (id, description) VALUES (1, 'First entry');
INSERT INTO t4 (id, description) VALUES (2, 'Second entry');
ALTER TABLE t5 ADD COLUMN ref_id INTEGER REFERENCES t4(id);
key_bug_features: Adding foreign key constraints to existing tables
